ordinanceLabel: Solana Beach Municipal Code (CodePublishing) · 2025 California Building Standards Code
fireAgency: Solana Beach Fire Department (city-operated, ISO Class 1)
coastalZoneNote: ENTIRE city is within California Coastal Zone. CCC CDP required before city building permit for all development.
